notes: Success artifact governance-evidence-27915176022 and controlled-failure artifact governance-evidence-27915324851 were downloaded into isolated temporary directories and independently verified.
The controlled-failure run failed only at the mandatory governance enforcement step after uploading the full governance evidence bundle.
Artifact evidence uses evidenceCommitSha null because workflow artifacts are immutable GitHub Actions downloads and are not committed back to the validated source commit.
The metadata file is committed after verification and records the validated commit rather than attempting an infinite evidence-commit rerun.
